purpose: Anchored Popover that displays validation messages from a Form. Lists errors/warnings/info from across the form so users can navigate to each.
whenToUse: Aggregate error display from a multi-field form
When users need to jump to each error from a single trigger
whenNotToUse: Inline field validation — use MessageStrip below the field
doRules: Anchor to a status button with error count
Group messages by severity (Errors / Warnings / Info)
Make each row navigable to the source field
dontRules: Do not use MessagePopover for non-form contexts
Do not omit the error count on the trigger button

layoutGuidance.placement: Place MessagePopover inside a compatible container (Form, Dialog).
layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto width unless explicitly sized; height matches density (Compact 26-32px, Cozy 36-44px).
layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px gap from adjacent elements; 16px between groups.

contentGuidance.labelLength: See doRules for specific length guidance.

responsiveBehavior.M: May condense — see Fiori responsive design guidelines.
responsiveBehavior.S: May convert to alternative pattern on narrow viewports.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Maps to ARIA pattern appropriate for feedback.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Full keyboard support — Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate.

exceptions: See pluginNotes for plugin-specific rendering caveats.
